chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No. S – 66 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.643/2021 (S/A) 14.04.2025 Mr. Yameen Ali Khoso, Advocate for the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Applicant under instructions does not press instant Civil Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge ARBROHI
